title: Maine Judicial Branch Jury Status Notices
description: Table of per-county jury reporting status notices with no reliable per-row link; monitored by full-page fingerprint.

items.title: Page updated: Maine Judicial Branch Jury Status Notices
items.content_text:
This page's content changed since the last check. Visit the page directly to review the update.

What changed (text excerpt):
Added:
  + All July 2026 trial jurors are to report for jury selection at 8:30AM on Monday, July 13th.
  + July 10, 2026
  + July 10, 2026
  + Piscataquis Judicial Center - Dover-Foxcroft, Maine
  + All Jurors need to report on Wednesday, August 5, 2026 at 8:30 am. Please call 564-2240 if you have any questions.
  + If there is inclement weather, please go to www.courts.maine.gov for updates.
  + PROHIBITION OF ELECTRONIC DEVICES: Please be advised that pursuant to Administrative Order JB-20-01, use of electronic devices during trial or while in deliberations are prohibited and all devices will need to be temporarily surrendered. During jury selection, all devices must be turned off.
Removed:
  - Jurors selected in the matter of State v Jordan are to report for trial at 9:00am on Monday July 6th. Please report to the Jury Assembly room on the second floor of the Cumberland County Courthouse in Portland.
  - All June 2026 trial jurors who have not been selected for the case mentioned previously are no longer expected to check this website or report for jury selection. Your jury service is now completed for 5 years with the thanks of the court!
  - June 23, 2026

items.title: Page updated: Maine Judicial Branch Jury Status Notices
items.content_text:
This page's content changed since the last check. Visit the page directly to review the update.

What changed (text excerpt):
Added:
  + July 2026 jurors: if your juror number is listed in this message, please report to the Capital Judicial Center on Friday, July 10, 2026 at 8:15 AM. Please listen carefully to see if you are to report on July 10 at 8:15:
  + Juror #2, 3, 6, 7, 9, 11, 12, 14, 15, 16, 19, 20, 22, 24, 25, 26, 27, 28, 30, 31, 32, 34, 38, 42, 43, 44, 45, 49, 51, 52, 53, 54, 58, 59, 70, 71, 72, 75, 76, 77, 78, 79, 80, 81, 82, 83, 84, 85, 87, 88, 91, 94, 95, 97, 99, 100, 102, 104, 105, 107, 108, 111, 112, 113, 114, 119, 120, 122, 123, 124, 125, 126, 128, 134, 135, 136, 137, 144, 145, 150, 151, 152, 153, 154, 155, 156, 157, 158, 159, 160, 162, 163, 166, 167, 169, 170, 172, 173, 174, 177, 178, 179, 181, 183, 184, 185, 188, 191, 193, 194, 195, 197, 204, 205, 206, 207, 208, 210, 212, 215, 219, 224, 226, 227, 230, 231, 232, 234, 236, 238, 243, 245, 246, 250, 254, 256, 258, and juror #260. If your juror number is NOT listed here, please do NOT report to jury duty on July 10. If your juror number is NOT listed here, then your jury duty is done. Thank you.
Removed:
  - All jurors summonsed for July jury selection, please report to the Capital Judicial Center on Thursday, July 9, 2026, at 8:30 AM.
  - Thank you and have a pleasant evening.

items.title: Page updated: Maine Judicial Branch Jury Status Notices
items.content_text:
This page's content changed since the last check. Visit the page directly to review the update.

What changed (text excerpt):
Added:
  + **July Jury Selection will be Thursday, July 9th at 9:00 a.m.
  + The following jurors do not need to report for selection on July 9th and August jury selections 11, 14, 26, 55, 69, 81, 82, 85, 126, 142, 165, 169, 178, 186, 192. Your service is complete.
  + **Please note that August dates have changed: Housekeeping will be held on Wed Aug 5th at 9am (approx 1 hr),Jury Selection Thurs Aug 6th at 9am and Fri Aug 7th at 9am. Plan to appear unless the Clerk has told you that you do not need to report. Thank you.**
  + All jurors summonsed for July jury selection, please report to the Capital Judicial Center on Thursday, July 9, 2026, at 8:30 AM.
  + Waldo County Superior Court - Belfast
  + All
  + Grand Jurors
  + are to report on Thursday July 23 and Friday July 24 at 8:30 am. Upon arrival please check in with the Jury Officer outside Courtroom #1.
  + If you have any questions, please call 338-3107 Monday through Friday between 8 am and 4 pm.
  + PROHIBITION OF ELECTRONIC DEVICES:
  + Please be advised that pursuant to Administrative Order JB-20-01, use of electronic devices during trial or while in deliberations are prohibited and all devices will need to be temporarily surrendered. During jury selection, all devices must be turned off.
  + July 8, 2026
Removed:
  - **July/August Traverse Jury** Will need to report for Jury Housekeeping on Wed July 8th at the time on your summons. Jurors #1-100 at 9am, Jurors #101-200 at 11am. Jury Selection will be held on Thurs 
[diff truncated]

What changed (text excerpt):
Added:
  + **July/August Traverse Jury** Will need to report for Jury Housekeeping on Wed July 8th at the time on your summons. Jurors #1-100 at 9am, Jurors #101-200 at 11am. Jury Selection will be held on Thurs July 9th at 8:30am. **Please note that August dates have changed: Housekeeping will be held on Wed Aug 5th at 9am (approx 1 hr), Jury Selection Thurs Aug 6th at 9am and Fri Aug 7th at 9am. Plan to appear unless the Clerk has told you that you do not need to report. Thank you.**

+ Jurors selected in the matter of State v Jordan are to report for trial at 9:00am on Monday July 6th. Please report to the Jury Assembly room on the second floor of the Cumberland County Courthouse in Portland.
+ All June 2026 trial jurors who have not been selected for the case mentioned previously are no longer expected to check this website or report for jury selection. Your jury service is now completed for 5 years with the thanks of the court!
